title: senecio pomacochana
intro: Senecio pomacochana, also known as Copalchi, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio pomacochana include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
